company.name: Legend Biotech
company.subtitle: CARVYKTI $1.9B sales · Profitability 2026 · Frontline MM expansion · In vivo CAR-T

assets.name: CARVYKTI — 2L+ MM (approved, commercial)
assets.stage: Commercial (approved US/EU/Japan/China, OS benefit in label)

market.notes: Legend 2025 revenue ~$1B ($1.9B CARVYKTI net trade sales by J&J). Q4: $306M (+64% YoY). 10K+ patients treated. 97% mfg success. <30 day TAT. 10K annualized capacity. 279 global sites.

Frontline MM drug market ~$15-20B total. CAR-T addressable subset ~$8B (transplant-eligible + ineligible candidates). CARTITUDE-5 + 6 both enrolled. CARTITUDE-4 showed 50.4mo median PFS in 2L+ — strong rationale for earlier use. Legend receives mfg revenue + profit share from J&J.
Dual CD19/CD20. Allogeneic = off-the-shelf. If validated, transforms CAR-T economics.
Dual CD20/CD19 in vivo — injection, no manufacturing. First patient dosed. Data H2 2026. Multiple INDs planned. Paradigm shift if it works.

mega_bear.narrative: CAR-T class safety signal / franchise collapse
events: ✗ FDA black box warning on secondary malignancies across CAR-T class
✗ CMS restricts reimbursement for CAR-T
✗ CARVYKTI revenue collapses, J&J deprioritizes
→ Stock re-rates to cash floor, pipeline worthless

bear.narrative: CARVYKTI growth stalls + frontline fails + competition erodes
events: ✗ CARVYKTI growth decelerates — bispecifics take share
✗ CARTITUDE-5/6 underwhelm vs standard of care
✗ Arcellx anito-cel approved, takes 2L+ share
→ Revenue plateaus at ~$1.2B Legend share

base.narrative: CARVYKTI grows + frontline expands TAM + platform validates
events: ✓ CARVYKTI revenue grows to ~$3B+ total (Legend ~$1.5B)
✓ CARTITUDE-5 or -6 positive — frontline label expansion
~ Allogeneic shows promise, needs more data
~ In vivo early data generates excitement

bull.narrative: CARVYKTI blockbuster + frontline SOC + in vivo paradigm shift
events: ✓ CARVYKTI total sales >$5B (Legend >$2B)
✓ Both CARTITUDE-5 + 6 positive — frontline standard
✓ In vivo CAR-T data transformative
✓ Autoimmune CAR-T expansion (SLE, MS)

psychedelic_bull.narrative: In vivo + autoimmune = platform acquisition at massive premium
events: ✓ CARVYKTI >$7B total sales, dominant in MM
✓ In vivo CAR-T works across oncology + autoimmune
✓ Autoimmune TAM unlock (SLE, MS, RA) = $50B+ opportunity
✓ J&J acquires Legend at 3-5x current price

lastData.title: CARVYKTI Q4 $555M sales + full-year profitability
points: Q4 CARVYKTI net trade sales: $555M (+66% YoY, +6% QoQ)
FY2025 CARVYKTI sales: $1.9B total (Legend total revenue ~$1B)
Q4 Legend revenue: $306M (+64% YoY), gross margin 61%
10,000+ patients treated, 97% mfg success, <30 day TAT
CARTITUDE-5 and CARTITUDE-6 both fully enrolled
In vivo CAR-T: first patient dosed, data expected H2 2026
LUCAR-G39D allogeneic: encouraging Phase 1 at ASH 2025
Stock at $17 vs $45 twelve months ago

nextCatalyst.title: In vivo CAR-T first-in-human data at major medical meeting
thresholds: Safety + initial efficacy of in vivo CD20/CD19 CAR-T
If positive: paradigm shift (injection vs 30-day manufacturing)
Also: multiple IND filings for oncology + autoimmune

risks: J&J collaboration — Legend gets ~50% of value, not 100%
Arcellx anito-cel gaining traction as BCMA CAR-T competitor
Bispecific antibodies eroding CAR-T share in later lines
Manufacturing complexity — capacity may not suffice for frontline
Stock down 60% despite strong fundamentals — what does market know?
In vivo CAR-T very early — high scientific risk
